evals.prompt: Compute NDVI for my study area from Sentinel-2 for last summer.
expected_behavior: Uses STAC search with sentinel-2-l2a (surface reflectance), records item IDs
Applies SCL cloud masking BEFORE computing the index and reports valid-pixel %
Uses B8/B4 explicitly and warns against hardcoded NDVI thresholds

evals.prompt: Compare vegetation between this 2018 L1C scene and this 2025 L2A scene.
expected_behavior: Flags TOA vs BOA mismatch and refuses to compare directly
Proposes consistent atmospheric correction or same-level reacquisition

evals.prompt: Classify land cover from this imagery and report accuracy.
expected_behavior: Uses a spatially independent test set (block split), citing the spatial CV protocol
Reports per-class F1/IoU and confusion matrix, not overall accuracy alone

evals.prompt: Audit this Sentinel-2 NDVI raster: clouds were masked after index calculation, shadows remain, and no valid-pixel percentage or item IDs were saved.
expected_behavior: Requires cloud and shadow masking on reflectance bands before index calculation
Recomputes valid-pixel coverage and inspects mask errors visually
Records collection, item IDs, acquisition dates, processing level, bands, and mask thresholds

evals.prompt: Use satellite imagery to assess vegetation condition, but the sensor, season, scale, and meaning of condition are not specified.
expected_behavior: Clarifies decision variable, spatial and temporal scale, season, sensor constraints, and validation data
Selects processing level, masking, bands or indices only after those requirements are defined
Plans uncertainty and ground-reference validation rather than equating one index with condition

evals.prompt: Estimate deforestation transitions and error-adjusted changed area between 2018 and 2025 from two validated land-cover maps.
expected_behavior: Routes to change-detection for transition, sampling, and adjusted-area inference
Does not stop at generic image classification once temporal change is the requested product

evals.prompt: Compute monthly cloud-masked Landsat composites for an entire continent in Earth Engine and export provincial summaries.
expected_behavior: Routes to google-earth-engine for planetary server-side collection processing
Does not default to a local raster workflow for the explicitly declared platform and scale
